general.name: Open Competition
general.description: General merit, no community-based reservation. SC/SCA/ST/MBC/BC/BCM candidates are also eligible to compete here in addition to their reserved quota.

general.name: Backward Class
general.description: Reservation for backward classes recognised by the Government of Tamil Nadu. Permanent community certificate required.

general.name: Backward Class Muslim
general.description: Reservation for Muslim communities classified as backward by the Government of Tamil Nadu.

general.name: Most Backward Class & Denotified Communities
general.description: Reservation for MBC and DNC communities listed in the Tamil Nadu government schedule.

general.name: Scheduled Caste
general.description: Reservation for Scheduled Caste candidates with valid community certificate from Tahsildar of native taluk.

general.name: Scheduled Caste Arunthathiyars
general.description: Sub-category within SC for Arunthathiyar community. Vacant SCA seats may be filled by SC in the SCA-to-SC round.

general.name: Scheduled Tribe
general.description: Reservation for Scheduled Tribe candidates with community certificate from RDO/Sub Collector of native place.

special.notes: Certificate from an officer of the Tamil Nadu Department of Ex-Servicemen Welfare (not below Assistant Director rank). Discharge certificate and Ex-Servicemen ID card of parent also required.
B.Arch is suitable for all 21 listed disabilities except 100% blindness. Medical Board certificate (minimum 3 doctors) of the district required, in the prescribed format.

special.quota: 6 seats (1 in University Department, 5 in Stand-alone Self Finance colleges)
special.notes: Selection based on total marks for sports achievements per Annexure III of the brochure. In-person verification at Chennai.

pwd_disability_list: Hearing Impairment (deaf and hard of hearing)

govt_school_quota.eligibility: Students who have studied 6th to 12th standard continuously in Tamil Nadu Government, Corporation, Municipal, Adi Dravidar & Tribal Welfare, Kallar Reclamation, Forest Department, or any other Government-managed school. Applies on top of all other categories including OC.
